name: Trust Circle
description: Resolves inbound messages to known speakers (anchor/guest/visitor) and injects guest-rank profile content into the agent prompt. Foundational policy layer for the trust circle architecture; consumed by continuity (speakerId metadata) and standing/contemplation/crystallization (rank-aware metabolism in Phase 5).

logResolutions.description: Log every speaker resolution to gateway.log. Helpful during build-out; can be quieted later.

injectGuestProfiles.description: Whether to inject the speaker's profile identityFile into the prompt context. False to disable Phase-6 fold-in.
